zh.lifeSummary: Anna Smythe於1410年出生在英國英格蘭貝德福爾貝德福德。她於1427年與Robert Spencer of Colmworth在英國諾薩普頓史爾巴德比結婚。他們至少是7個兒子的父母。她去世於1504年在英國英格蘭貝德福爾享年94歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾易爾林波洛。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Anna Smythe于1410年出生在英国英格兰貝德福爾貝德福德。她于1427年与Robert Spencer of Colmworth在英国諾薩普頓史爾巴德比结婚。他们至少是7个儿子的父母。她去世于1504年在英国英格兰貝德福爾享年94岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾易爾林波洛。

nameMeanings.name: Smythe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Smith
meanings: English and Scottish: occupational name denoting a worker in metal, especially iron, such as a blacksmith or farrier, from Middle English smith ‘smith’ (Old English smith, probably a derivative of smītan ‘to strike, hammer’). Early examples are also found in the Latin form Faber . Metal-working was one of the earliest occupations for which specialist skills were required, and its importance ensured that this term and its equivalents in other languages were the most widespread of all occupational surnames in Europe. Medieval smiths were important not only in making horseshoes, plowshares, and other domestic articles, but above all for their skill in forging swords, other weapons, and armor. This is also the most frequent of all surnames in the US. It is very common among African Americans and Native Americans (see also 5 below). This surname (in any of the two possible English senses; see also below) is also found in Haiti. See also Smither .

English: from Middle English smithe ‘smithy, forge’ (Old English smiththe). The surname may be topographic, for someone who lived in or by a blacksmith's shop, occupational, for someone who worked in one, or habitational, from a place so named, such as Smitha in King's Nympton (Devon). Compare Smithey .
Irish and Scottish: sometimes adopted for Gaelic Mac Gobhann, Irish Mac Gabhann ‘son of the smith’. See McGowan .

nameMeanings.name: Anna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

variants.name: Anne
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

en.lifeSummary: Anna Smythe was born in 1410, in Bedford, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom. She married Robert Spencer of Colmworth in 1427, in Badby, Northamptonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons. She died in 1504, in Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 94, and was buried in Irthlingborough, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom.

Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils. Elle est décédée en 1504, à Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 94 ans, et a été enterrée à Irthlingborough, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Anna Smytheは1410年にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアベドフォードで生まれた。1427年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアバドビーでRobert Spencer of Colmworthと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子の親であった。彼女は1504年にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアで94歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアイルスリングボロウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Anna Smythe(은)는 1410년 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 베드퍼드에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1427년 영국 노르섬프토실르 바드비에서 Robert Spencer of Colmworth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1504년 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르에서 94세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 이르슬링버루그h에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Anna Smythe родилась в 1410 г. в местности бедфорд, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Spencer of Colmworth в 1427 г. в местности бадби, нортамптоншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей. Она умерла в 1504 г. в местности бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 94 лет и была похоронена в местности иртлингбороую, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания.
